headline: SMCI -17% on $7B dilutive raise poisons AI complex; desk takes lone half-size SGHC long

market_state.line: SPY -0.85% / QQQ -1.15%, both above 50d. VXX stress 1.03 — low fear but tape fading; regime reads risk_on yet price action is sloppy. Chop b

actions.line: Half-size long — clean R/R off bullish signal; research caps size post-10% run. 18¢ risk, 36¢ reward, ~2:1.

watch.line: -17.2% on massive $7B dilutive raise — balance-sheet strain; do not chase short into extended move.
Med-conf bullish ripple off SMCI: hyperscalers may rotate to better-capitalized PowerEdge franchise. Counter-read (low conf): ISG margin narrative also questioned.
+21.7% big move, rel-vol only 1.07 — thin conviction on the squeeze; watch for fade.
+16.3%, MACD bullish but flagged overbought — momentum intact, no clean entry yet.
Low-conf bearish sympathy to SMCI — AI-levered stretched valuation, dilution risk premium re-pricing.

changed: Selling wave eased — movers now mixed with big upside names (RXT +22%, CLOV +16%) vs prior wall-to-wall red
Desk rotated: IRT long gone, replaced by SGHC half-size long
SMCI -17% dilutive raise is the dominant event this scan
caveats: RTH scan as of 11:45 ET Jun 10 — prices stale from scan time, fast movers (SMCI, RXT) may have extended materially intraday.
DELL has conflicting ripple reads (bullish AND bearish, both from SMCI) — no net edge; treat as watch-only until one narrative dominates.
